layout.spacing: generous whitespace, asymmetrical bento grids for galleries, wide gaps (gap-12 to gap-24)
layout.aesthetic: Editorial magazine feel, Vogue meets fine dining. Open and airy.

navigation.style: Fixed top, transparent background initially, shrinks and adds backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F8F6F2]/80 on scroll.

hero.animation: Word by word text split slide-in on load. Full-screen height.
hero.layout: Minimalist centered or asymmetrical split with large typography and floating image.

menu_section.layout: Horizontal scroll for highlights. Speisekarte with editorial category layout (Antipasti, Minestre, Pesce, Carni, Formaggi, Dolci).
menu_section.animations: Dish names slide in from left, descriptions from right.

images.style: Sharp or slightly rounded corners (max rounded-sm).
images.animations: Parallax on full-width images. Image reveal effect: wipe in behind sliding color overlay (#D9C5B2).

stats.animation: Numbers count up when scrolled into view.

buttons.style: Minimal text links with underline animation, or solid primary (#0A0A0A) blocks with elegant hover states (scale up slightly, lighter background).

forms.style: Reservierung and Party Service forms with floating labels, minimal borders, no background.

map.style: Grayscale or desaturated filter to match the #F8F6F2 aesthetic.

animations.scroll: Sections fade + rise (translate-y-8 to 0, opacity 0 to 1) via IntersectionObserver.
animations.hover: Subtle image scales, text color shifts to secondary (#D9C5B2).

sample_items.name: Misto di Carpaccio
sample_items.desc: Salmone e Branzino in Scheiben, mariniert

sample_items.name: Taglierini verdi
sample_items.desc: Grüne Nudeln mit Tomatensauce und Kräutern

instructions_to_main_agent: Tailwind config must extend font families for 'sans' (Inter) and 'serif' (Cormorant Garamond).
All scroll animations must use raw CSS/IntersectionObserver hooks. Do not use heavy animation libraries unless necessary.
Implement the Word-by-word text split animation using a custom React component mapping over the string and delaying CSS transforms.
Horizontal scroll for menu highlights can be built with a sticky container and horizontal overflow or a flex container that translates horizontally based on scroll percentage.
The Kontakt page must include a React-leaflet or simple iframe to OpenStreetMap with a filter: grayscale(100%) applied via CSS to match the aesthetic.
Add custom cursor logic for images: a div fixed to mouse coordinates that scales up and shows 'View' or a dot when hovering specific data-cursor targets.
Reservation and Party Service forms are frontend only, mock submission.
Ensure generous spacing! Avoid tight paddings. Use p-12 to p-24.
Background must explicitly be #F8F6F2, do not use white.
